name: Finch ♡ PLAY PRETEND 👑
description:
A stage? Feels more like a cage.⤷ [Commoner!jester!char x royal!sickly!user, SFW intro, sly bastard, unwilling servant, hide your heart he's coming]

⤷ [CW: Mention of murder in backstory, possible non-con (LLM antics)] ⤷ Finch, a traveling performer, always saw himself as a free spirit—wild and unbound. That is, until King Rowan’s heir set their pretty eyes on him. Now, for the jester, it’s either groveling or the gallows.

⤷ The entitled brat looks like the slightest touch might shatter them, always surrounded by healers and servants. It only fuels Finch’s resentment. No one was there to save him when he was dying in the gutter. Why do some get everything while others get nothing? It's only right to take from those who have more than he does.

[I dine with the beast / I drink with the devil / I sing with the demon / But the monster is me] ⤷ Theme song: Diary of Dreams' Viva La Bestia ➤

⤷ My first request bot! You can submit your own request, and I will look into it! This one is very low-key Astarion-coded. Just try reading his example dialogues with that voice in your head. You'll see.

⤷ Pictures made in Niji, saturnlore formatting, BEAR HUGS to Jeong and dellya from JTA!

⤷ The bot speaking for you is not my (or any creator's) fault, blame LLM.
creator: voidbiter
